definition:
συμ-βαίνω 
 [in LXX for עָשָׂה, קָרָא, קָרָה, etc. ;] 
  1. to stand with the feet together. 
   2. to come together, come to terms. 
   3. Of events, to come to pass, happen: with dative of person(s), Mrk.10:32, Act.3:10 20:19, 1Co.10:11, 1Pe.4:12, 2Pe.2:22; absol., τὰ σνμβεβηκότα, Luk.24:14 (cf. 1Ma.4:26); with accusative and nf., Act.21:35.†
 (AS)
